title: Uttam Nagar Holi murder: Police assures Delhi High Court it will provide best protection to victim's family
description: The Delhi Police on Thursday told the Delhi High Court that it will ensure the “best possible protection” for the family of 26-year-old Tarun, who was killed in Uttam Nagar during recent Holi celebrations. Justice Girish Kathpalia ordered the Delhi Police to ensure that the personal mobile number of the local Station House Officer (SHO) is provided to the victim’s family so that the police can be contacted in times of distress. Justice Girish Kathpalia The Court passed the order a
